channel.title: 2026-05-06 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-06 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Scaling Laws of Quantum Information Lifetime in Monitored Quantum Dynamics
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Bingzhi Zhang, Fangjun Hu, Runzhe Mo, Tianyang Chen, Hakan E. Türeci, and Quntao Zhuang
Author(s): Bingzhi Zhang, Fangjun Hu, Runzhe Mo, Tianyang Chen, Hakan E. Türeci, and Quntao Zhuang Researchers have discovered that recording data from midcircuit measurements can preserve quantum information for an exponentially long time. This finding offers a strategy to preserve fragile data and improve the performance of near-term quantum computers and algorithms. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 021027] Published Wed May 06, 2026
